hero.headline: Launch Your Online Store in Minutes
hero.subheadline: StoreLaunch platform helps you create a professional store without technical expertise.

features.title: Our Key Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to successfully launch your online store

easyStore.title: Easy Store Creation
easyStore.description: Start your online store in minutes without complications. An easy-to-use interface enables you to launch your store quickly.

customize.title: Template Customization Without Coding
customize.description: Design your store the way you want. Choose from professional templates and customize them easily without programming knowledge.

inventory.title: Product & Inventory Management
inventory.description: Add your products easily and manage inventory automatically. Track available quantities and receive alerts when stock runs out.

reports.title: Reports & Sales Tracking
reports.description: Monitor your store's performance with comprehensive reports on sales and profits. Track orders and customers and make informed decisions.

payments.title: Local Payment Methods Support (Mada – STC Pay)
payments.description: Accept payments easily through Mada, STC Pay, and other local payment methods. A smooth and secure payment experience for your customers.

shipping.title: Shipping Support with Local Service Providers
shipping.description: Easy integration with local shipping companies. Manage shipments and track orders with the best service providers in the region.

pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the right plan for your store

cta.title: Ready to Launch Your Store?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of successful businesses already using StoreLaunch to grow their online presence.

footer.description: The complete e-commerce solution for modern businesses. Build, manage, and grow your online store with ease.
